payload.prompt:
CoS skill audit v1 complete. Doc: docs/ops/CHIEF_OF_STAFF_SKILL_AUDIT_2026-05-01.md (commit 4e494e91, on main).

Audit covers all 10 agents. Splits proposed:
- Research (your example): 7 skills → 4-agent subtree (Lead + PDF-Reader + YouTube-Watcher + Web-Crawler). Phase 1.
- Documentation-KM: 6 → 3 (Lead + Sync-Worker + ShowNotes). −$7.20/mo.
- DevOps: 7 → 3 (Lead + Monitor + WebExport). −$12.90/mo.
- Quality-Tech: sequential pipeline, DEFER.
- CEO/CTO: REJECT split (single-point-of-authority).
- Pipeline-Op / Quality-Business / Development: DEFER pending data or near-min.

Phase 1+2 net: −$18.90/mo on ~$295/mo full-steady-state estimate (analytical, not empirical).

Decide per phase:
- Phase 1 (Research subtree): accept / reject / defer
- Phase 2 (Doc-KM + DevOps): accept / reject / defer
- Phase 3 (QT): default = defer until first P7 review

On accept: CEO executes hires via paperclip-create-agent skill, Doc-KM updates org chart.
